summary: Bug fix verified: Users tab successfully restored in admin panel sidebar. Tab appears after Analytics and before Candidates as expected. All functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: Users tab added to sidebarItems array at line 3357 with correct structure: { id: 'users', label: 'Users', icon: Users }
Position correct: Users tab is 2nd item after Analytics, before Candidates dropdown
UsersSection component already existed at line 174 with full functionality
Render logic already existed at line 3662: {activeSection === 'users' && <UsersSection />}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Users tab bug fix verified. The tab was missing from sidebarItems array but UsersSection component and render logic were already present. Main agent added the tab entry at line 3357.
